svg.title: MediTrack patient booking workflow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow: patient registers, logs in, enters symptoms, gets routed, picks doctor, selects slot, confirms booking, receives email

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the MediTrack registration page work?')
sendPrompt('What fields does MediTrack registration collect?')
sendPrompt('How does MediTrack JWT login work?')
g.text: JWT token issued, stored in cookie

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the MediTrack symptom routing engine in detail')
g.text: AI engine scores departments, top 2 shown

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does doctor search and filtering work in MediTrack?')
g.text: Filtered by dept, shows fees + availability

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MediTrack slot availability checking work with SQL?')
g.text: Step 5 — Pick date and time slot
SQL checks existing bookings, shows free slots

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through what happens when sp_BookAppointment runs')
g.text: Stored proc runs, conflict check, insert

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What email does MediTrack send after booking?')
g.text: Email sent via MailKit, dashboard updated

svg.text: Purple = auth layer | Teal = hospital service | Gray = neutral steps & API calls
